summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HoneyGroove vinyl collector social network. All P0 bugs fixed and verified. Backend 100% pass rate (15/15 tests). Frontend critical flows all working correctly.

fixed_in_session.issue: Share graphic generation failing with Pillow regular_polygon bounding_circle error
fixed_in_session.fix: Updated draw.regular_polygon() calls to use correct tuple format ((x, y), r) instead of (x, y, r)

issues: Missing DialogDescription for accessibility - console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for DialogContent'

passed_tests: Landing page shows correct test credentials: demo@example.com / password123
Login with demo@example.com / password123 redirects to /hive
Collection page sorting - all 10 sort options present
Collection page - Album Title Z → A selection works without crash
Like posts - heart icon toggles correctly (like/unlike)
Comments on feed posts - write and submit 'Hello from test!' successfully
Share graphic modal - shows Square (1080x1080) and Story (1080x1920) options
Navigation: The Hive, Explore, Collection, Add Record all accessible via navbar
Profile page /profile/demo - shows stats (Records, Spins, Followers, Following)
Profile page - Collection tab and records displayed
critical_code_review_comments: DialogContent accessibility warning: Share dialog missing aria-describedby - add DialogDescription component
seed_data_creation: None - existing demo user with 4 records used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 features verified working. Demo user has 4 records (Taylor Swift - Lover, Fleetwood Mac - Rumours, Pink Floyd - Dark Side of the Moon, The Beatles - Abbey Road). Share graphic generation now working after Pillow API fix. Comments and likes functioning correctly.
